title: Straßenmusik in Heidelberg
further_info: Recommended Reading S. Chaker, „Busking in the Neo-Liberal City: A Critical Inventory of a Selection of Street Art Ordinances in Austria“, in: International Journal of Community Music (16/2), 2023, S. 155–175, <https://doi.org/10.1386/ijcm_00082_1>; S. Cohen, Sara, „Ethnography and Popular Music Studies“, in: Popular Music (12/2), 1993, S. 123–138; L. Gilman u. J. Fenn: Handbook for Folklore and Ethnomusicology Fieldwork, Bloomington (IN) 2019.
